meta.title: About Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko | Orthopedic Specialist, Shoulder & Knee Surgeon
meta.description: Meet Dr. Vyacheslav Dubenko — orthopedic specialist and shoulder & knee surgeon with 37 years of experience. Conservative-first treatment philosophy, arthroscopic surgery, and Maccabi clinics in Rehovot, Bnei Ayish and Rishon LeZion.
